title: Forest Ruins
description: Adds many different ruins to all forest biomes
body:
**This mod adds many different ruins to all forest biomes.**
![Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d315b1c970e720137fe6a1ed1cee5642ad346f4.jpeg)

- Hidden Treasures: Secret chests are hidden in some ruins
  
![Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/588f5eb3c8faa418510a555021e35cc63206f391.jpeg)

- Spawning: The ruins will spawn in all forest biomes
  
![Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/477c464e8cdbf73aa7cdee6aeb0f4eb370d56f13.jpeg)

![Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f9f481a8099af96621d926eabcc5030516ea3a3.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks

Also check out the Desert Ruins Mod:
[https://modrinth.com/mod/desert-ruins](https://modrinth.com/mod/desert-ruins)
